positive: A vibrant, retro 8-bit pixel art illustration of a space sloth riding a comet, surrounded by glowing nebula dust. Synthwave aesthetic, highly detailed, neon pink and electric blue color palette, vector graphic style, perfect for t-shirt printing.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, jpeg artifacts, grainy, amateur sketch
